data.title: Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. plans to change its Board of Directors with appointments to be ratified at the 36th Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on March 25, 2026.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. in Tokyo, Japan, and Cambridge, UK disclosed the approval from their Board of Directors for a change in Directors. This move includes the nomination of candidates for External Directors, following the resolution of the Nomination Committee. The appointments are anticipated to be formally confirmed pending the approval of resolutions at the upcoming 36th Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders set for March 25, 2026. Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd., listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange (TSE 4565), is taking strategic steps in its leadership structure.

data.title: Eli Lilly stockpiles $1.5B of weight-loss pill as FDA decision nears, expedited review possible.
data.description: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY) has accumulated inventory valued at $1.5 billion for its new oral weight-loss drug, orforglipron, in preparation for the anticipated decision by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) in April. This marks a significant increase from last year's inventory worth around $550 million. The FDA has granted the weight-loss pill a fast-track review voucher, potentially reducing the approval timeline to just one or two months, compared to the typical 10 to 12 months for most new drugs. Eli Lilly has expressed confidence in having an adequate supply to launch the drug simultaneously in multiple countries upon receiving U.S. approval. Medicare has shown support for obesity drugs, as highlighted in a detailed article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Thomas Lee, Chair of BitMine Immersion, praises MrBeast's entry into finance sector, sees him as key figure for Gen Z.
data.description: Thomas Lee, Chairman of BitMine Immersion, discussed how YouTube star MrBeast's entry into the financial industry could impact young generations' financial interests. Mr. Beast, also known as Jimmy Donaldson, is venturing into banking, potentially becoming a preferred financial platform for Gen Z and Gen Alpha. Lee drew comparisons to how Charles Schwab targeted baby boomers, BlackRock and Blackstone attracted Generation X, and Robinhood, SoFi, and Chime appealed to millennials. Lee believes MrBeast could become the next big player in the financial space, combining the strengths of Robinhood, SoFi, and Chime. This analysis was shared at the Consensus Hong Kong event. Full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stock futures mixed on Friday, awaiting January inflation print. Experts estimate core CPI at 2.52%. Dow -0.13%, Nasdaq +0.13%. Roku up 13.70%, Arista Networks up 12.12% after strong earnings. 92.1% chance Fed keeps rates unchanged in March.
data.description: U.S. stock futures fluctuated on Friday after Thursday's lower close. Experts predict January's core CPI to drop to 2.52%, signaling pre-COVID inflation levels. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.12%, with a 3.47% two-year bond. The CME Group indicates a 92.1% chance of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates steady in March. Dow Jones was down 0.13%, S&P 500 up 0.02%, Nasdaq 100 rose 0.13%, and Russell 2000 fell by 0.08%. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF was up 0.069% at $681.74, while the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF advanced 0.16% to $601.61. Roku surged 13.70% on strong Q4 results, beating estimates by 93.43%. Arista Networks gained 12.12% after surpassing Q4 earnings and issuing robust guidance. Full story on Benzinga.com.
